_comment: Species: Six-Desire Devil (六欲魔) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Six-Desire Devil

canonical.appearance: Humanoid devil 3 m tall, six arms, body wreathed in pink desire-mist, face shifts to mirror the desires of viewers
canonical.size: 3 m adult, 400 jin (mostly spirit, not flesh)
canonical.behavior: Lures cultivators by manifesting their deepest desires; drains desire-essence; cultivates by consuming the fallen
canonical.habitat: Sea of Devils, desire-aspected caves, corrupted spirit veins
canonical.cultivation: Nascent Soul -> Spirit Severing -> Ascendant (desire attribute)
canonical.diet: desire-essence, fallen cultivator soul fragments, desire-aspected herbs
canonical.relationships: Servant-devils of devil-sects; enemies of all orthodox cultivators
canonical.bloodline: Desire-Devil lineage; born of accumulated mortal desire
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: six_desire_devil — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
